nasb.text: And I will bring the third part through the fire, Refine them as silver is refined, And test them as gold is tested. They will call on My name, And I will answer them; I will say, ‘They are My people,’ And they will say, ‘The Lord is my God.’ ”

esv.text: And I will put this third into the fire, and refine them as one refines silver, and test them as gold is tested. They will call upon my name, and I will answer them. I will say, ‘They are my people’; and they will say, ‘The Lord is my God.’”

cnv.text: 我必使這三分之一經火試煉。 我要煉淨他們，像煉淨銀子一樣； 我要試煉他們，像試煉金子一樣。 他們必呼求我的名，我必應允他們。 我要說：‘他們是我的子民。’ 他們也要說：‘耶和華是我們的　神。’”

ccb.text: 我必使这三分之一的人受到火一般的考验； 我必像熬炼银子一样熬炼他们， 像试炼金子一样试炼他们。 他们必呼求我的名， 我必回应他们。 我必说，‘这是我的子民。’ 他们必说，‘耶和华是我们的上帝。’”
